{"id":"project-LICHEN-mqoh","title":"codec.rs: UDP checksum of zero not replaced with 0xFFFF per RFC 768/8200","description":"File: rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs
Lines: 194-200 (finalize function), also affects udp_checksum at 202-211

Category: PROTOCOL

The finalize() function computes the UDP/ICMPv6 checksum as the one's complement of the one's complement sum:
```rust
fn finalize(sum: u32) -> u16 {
    ...
    !(s as u16)
}
```

Per RFC 768 and RFC 8200, if the computed checksum is zero (occurs when one's complement sum equals 0xFFFF), it must be transmitted as 0xFFFF (all ones), because a zero checksum in IPv6 UDP is invalid and indicates an error.

Impact: Rare edge case where data sums to 0xFFFF would produce invalid IPv6 UDP packets with zero checksum.

Fix: In finalize() or at call sites, replace zero checksum with 0xFFFF:
```rust
let cksum = finalize(sum);
let cksum = if cksum == 0 { 0xFFFF } else { cksum };
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:40:09.580121Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:40:09.580161Z"}

let cksum = if cksum == 0 { 0xFFFF } else { cksum };
```","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:40:09.580121Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:16:31.257911559Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:16:31.257911559Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:31.257911559Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:16:31.257911559Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Fix already present in finalize(); checksum zero replaced with 0xFFFF per RFC. Commit: $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)"}
